div.head: The Ambassador in Brazil (Caffery) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Rio de Janeiro, June 22, 1943—11:15 a.m.
[Received June 28—4 p.m.]

div.p: A–1310. Reference my airgram A–1174, June 11, 10 a.m.…

Sr. Valentim BouçasExecutive Secretary, Commission for the Control of the Washington Agreements. informed the Embassy yesterday that President Vargas has strongly disapproved of Guedes’Jayme Fernandes Guedes, President, National Coffee Department. action in increasing
coffee prices following the entry into the market of the United States Quartermaster. Bouças said: “I would not be surprised if President Vargas made a gift of a substantial quantity of coffee to the Armed Forces of the United States Government”.
